monitor_the_situation.title: Israel Accelerates Land Grabs in Gaza, West Bank
— S3 · Political · Hebron, West Bank, Palestine · 14m ago. Israel accelerates land seizures in Gaza and West Bank, with permanent alterations at Hebron's Ibrahimi Mosque and new settlement plans.
— S3 · Economic · Strait of Hormuz · 33m ago. Pakistan government says inflationary pressures will ease in the new fiscal year after the Strait of Hormuz reopened following the US-Iran ceasefire.
Israel Kills Hamas Battalion Commander in Rafah Airstrike

— S3 · Conflict · Rafah, Gaza Strip, Palestine · 58m ago. Israeli Air Force and Shin Bet killed Muhammad Fathi Abd al-Hay Abu Fakhri, commander of Hamas's Yabna Battalion in Rafah, in a targeted airstrike.
